inject_prompt.description: Ask the model to wrap reply segments with [start] and [end].

max_segments.description: Maximum number of output segments. Overflow content is merged into the final segment.

fallback_max_chars.description: When markers are missing, split plain text longer than this many characters. Set 0 to disable fallback splitting.

send_separately.description: Actively send split segments as separate messages. If disabled, the plugin only cleans markers and leaves final sending to AstrBot.
